rule CDB_CVE202616076__AstrBotDevs_AstrBot_API_op {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-16076 - AstrBotDevs AstrBot API open_api.py OpenApiRoute.chat_send auth"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-07-18"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-16076" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "AstrBotDevs" ascii wide nocase
        $kw1 = "AstrBot" ascii wide nocase
        $kw2 = "OpenApiRoute" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
